title: Discount campaigns
excerpt:

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I want to do promotion for one of my apps I encounter difficulties with the monday billing existing process.
I would like to have a one to many promotion code that I can generate and send out to customers. That help us scale our sales and promotion efforts. At the moment, every discount is one-time, and must be super precise with the plan type, therefore we have many back and forth with customers around discounts which is time consuming. In Atlassian’s marketplace you can generate multi-use promotion code to send to customers and partners which is super successful mechanism to increase sales

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @Michaleiba for the request! Intersting!

Everyone: You can vote for it at the top of the screen!

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to have the ability for customers to enter discount codes when purchasing.

A few spec points which come to mind:

  1. As a developer, I’d want to be able to use this to attribute sales to a source, so being able to see which customers used which codes would be really important.
  2. Being able to create codes by the API would be great, but creating/updating/deleting in the UI would also be fine.
  3. Ability to time limit, or limit the number of uses would also be important for preventing over-use

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
These are great! I just thought I want the discount haha you made it specific
Thanks for that

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml: Love this idea in general and Ben’s points especially!
